notes: Director phone: (954) 831-6075. Info line (automated): (954) 831-6076. Family/Dependency phone: (954) 831-6325. Community Justice Alternatives phone: (954) 831-6004. Community Justice Alternatives (formerly CDS) handles pre-filed cases, state attorney referrals, criminal matters, and neighborhood disputes. Hours 8:30 AM–5:00 PM Mon–Fri.
